questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to RAID Configurations?
options: Inefficient scaling of RAID 0 stripe, RAID 1 mirror, RAID 5 parity, RAID 10 hybrid setups.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of RAID 0 stripe, RAID 1 mirror, RAID 5 parity, RAID 10 hybrid setups.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how RAID 0 stripe, RAID 1 mirror, RAID 5 parity, RAID 10 hybrid setups scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
